scenes.description: Intro animation with "Glitter of Love" title and a count-off.
Omaru Polka performs "ETERNAL BLAZE" with backup dancers on a stage with laser lights and fire effects.

subtitles.original: 遥か空響いてる
subtitles.english: Echoing in the distant sky,

subtitles.original: 祈りは奇跡に
subtitles.english: Prayers become miracles...

subtitles.original:
ETERNAL BLAZE
作詞：水樹奈々
作曲：上松範康(Elements Garden)
subtitles.english:
ETERNAL BLAZE
Lyrics: Nana Mizuki
Composition: Noriyasu Agematsu (Elements Garden)

subtitles.original: 真昼の月追い越して
subtitles.english: Overtaking the midday moon,

subtitles.original: 流れてく涙の粒
subtitles.english: The falling teardrops...

subtitles.original: 迷いなく包み込む温もりに出会った
subtitles.english: Encountered a warmth that envelops without hesitation

subtitles.original: 真っ白な雪のように どこまでも素直な言葉
subtitles.english: Words as honest as pure white snow,

subtitles.original: 鉄の羽纏った 僕を動かしていく
subtitles.english: Clad in iron wings, they set me in motion

subtitles.original: 傷つく度 優しくなれる
subtitles.english: Every time I get hurt, I can become kinder

subtitles.original: 君のその笑顔だけ
subtitles.english: If only for your smile,

subtitles.original: 守り抜きたい 願いはひとつ
subtitles.english: There's one wish I want to protect till the end

subtitles.original: 時を越え刻まれた 悲しみの記憶
subtitles.english: The memories of sadness carved across time

subtitles.original: まっすぐに受け止める 君は光の戦士
subtitles.english: Accepting them head-on, you are a warrior of light

subtitles.original: あの日胸に灯った 永遠の炎
subtitles.english: The eternal flame lit in my heart that day

subtitles.original: 深い闇解き放って 自由の扉開いてく
subtitles.english: Unleashing the deep darkness, opening the door to freedom

subtitles.original: 強く果てない未来へ
subtitles.english: Toward a strong and endless future

subtitles.original: 深い緑の月に 映し出す心の影
subtitles.english: The shadow of my heart reflected on the deep green moon

subtitles.original: 寂しげに呟いた 君の傍にいたい
subtitles.english: Whispered loneliness, I want to be by your side

subtitles.original: 真実と向き合うこと 教えてくれた勇気は
subtitles.english: The courage you gave me to face the truth

subtitles.original: 僕を駆け巡って 夢に目覚めてゆく
subtitles.english: Courses through me, awakening into a dream

subtitles.original: 触れ合う気持ち 離れないように
subtitles.english: So our shared feelings don't drift apart

subtitles.original: しっかりと抱きしめて
subtitles.english: I'll hold you tight,

subtitles.original: 確かな想い貫いてゆく
subtitles.english: Pushing through with certain feelings

subtitles.original: 銀の海に隠した 空白のページ
subtitles.english: The blank pages hidden in the silver sea

subtitles.original: 君だけが知っている 本当の僕を見せて
subtitles.english: Show me the real me that only you know

subtitles.original: 吹き荒れる切なさに 生まれゆく誓い
subtitles.english: The oath born from the raging sadness

subtitles.original: もう何も怖くないよ
subtitles.english: I'm not afraid of anything anymore

subtitles.original: 結んだ視線そらさずに
subtitles.english: Without looking away from our joined gaze

subtitles.original: 大切な今 始める
subtitles.english: Starting the precious "now"

subtitles.original: 君が君でいられる場所 幻にさせないように
subtitles.english: The place where you can be yourself, I won't let it become an illusion

subtitles.original: 消えない雨の苦しみも
subtitles.english: Even the pain of the never-ending rain,

subtitles.original: 鍵を壊してぶつけてよ
subtitles.english: Break the lock and release it to me

subtitles.original: 隣にいるから 全てを信じて
subtitles.english: Because I'm right here by your side, believe in everything

subtitles.original: 時を越え刻まれた 悲しみの記憶
subtitles.english: The memories of sadness carved across time

subtitles.original: まっすぐに受け止める 君は光の戦士
subtitles.english: Accepting them head-on, you are a warrior of light

subtitles.original: あの日胸に灯った 永遠の炎
subtitles.english: The eternal flame lit in my heart that day

subtitles.original: 深い闇解き放って
subtitles.english: Unleashing the deep darkness...
